Class NativeMPFRNumbers

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.nativ.mathematics.numbers.real.backends.NativeMPFRNumbers
public final class NativeMPFRNumbers extends Object
Native MethodHandles for MPFR transcendental functions. Provides access to high-precision exp, log, sin, cos, etc.
Since:
2.0
Author:
Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
